videos.headline: Augsburg and Wolfsburg battle to 1-1 draw
videos.title: Augsburg and Wolfsburg battle to 1-1 draw
videos.caption:
Robert Gumny stuns Wolfsburg with equalizer goal in the 55th minute, ending the game in a 1-1 draw
at Volkswagen Arena Stadium.
videos.description:
Robert Gumny stuns Wolfsburg with equalizer goal in the 55th minute, ending the game in a 1-1 draw
at Volkswagen Arena Stadium.
